picture.heading: Your Journey Starts Here
picture.subtext: Whether you are planning a trip or need help deciding, we are here to make your travel experience smooth and memorable.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find quick answers to the most common questions about our tours, bookings, and services.

items.question: How do I book a tour?
items.answer: You can book a tour directly on our website by selecting your preferred tour, choosing a date, and completing the checkout process. You can also contact us by WhatsApp or email for help.

items.question: What is included in the tour price?
items.answer: Our tour prices include transportation, a professional guide, entrance fees to listed attractions, and travel insurance. Any additional services will be clearly stated on the tour page.

items.question: Can I customize a tour itinerary?
items.answer: Yes. We offer fully customizable itineraries based on your interests and schedule. Contact our team and we will plan the right experience for you.

items.question: What should I bring on the tour?
items.answer: We recommend comfortable walking shoes, clothing suited to the weather, a valid ID, your booking confirmation, water, and any personal medications you may need.

items.question: What is your cancellation policy?
items.answer: Cancellations made more than 48 hours before the tour start are eligible for a full refund. Cancellations within 48 hours may incur a fee. Please review the full policy on the booking page.

items.question: Are meals included in the tours?
items.answer: Meals are not included unless stated on the tour page. We do plan stops at local restaurants where you can enjoy the local cuisine at your own cost.

items.question: Do you offer group discounts?
items.answer: Yes, we offer reduced rates for groups of 8 or more. Contact us directly for a quote tailored to your group size and tour preferences.

items.question: Do you offer private tours?
items.answer: Yes. Private tours are available for individuals, couples, families, and corporate groups. You will have a fully personalised experience at your own pace.

contact.heading: Still have questions?
contact.subtext: Our team is here to help. Contact us and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
